name: Zakum
mechanics: Multiple arms phase followed by body phase; arms must be destroyed first, avoid falling pillars.
rewards: Zakum Helmet, condensed power crystals, occult cubes.
story_significance: An ancient idol of El Nath that was corrupted by dark magic and brought to monstrous life.

name: Zakum
mechanics: Enhanced version with stronger attacks, more HP on arms, potent seal and darkness debuffs.
rewards: Superior Zakum Helmet, advanced crystals, flames of rebirth.
story_significance: The fully awakened form of the corrupted El Nath idol, magnitudes stronger than its dormant state.

name: Horntail
mechanics: Multi-body dragon fight; destroy heads, tails, legs, and wings separately. Seduce and dispel mechanics.
rewards: Horntail Pendant, dragon equipment, power crystals.
story_significance: The ancient dragon guardian of Leafre's Cave of Life, driven mad by the corruption spreading through Maple World.

name: Horntail
mechanics: Greatly enhanced with 1-shot breath attacks, stronger seduce, and a deadly final phase.
rewards: Chaos Horntail Pendant, premium crystals, flames of rebirth.
story_significance: Horntail at the apex of its draconic fury, representing the full corruption of the Cave of Life.

name: Hilla
mechanics: Summons undead minions, uses cage mechanic to trap players, drains HP with dark magic.
rewards: Necromancer equipment, Blackheart Pet, power crystals.
story_significance: A commander of the Black Mage who rules Azwan with necromantic power, once a shaman who sold her soul for immortality.

name: Hilla
mechanics: Enhanced cage mechanics, stronger undead waves, potent darkness debuffs, requires high damage.
rewards: Enhanced Necromancer gear, Blackheart Pet, superior crystals.
story_significance: Hilla unleashing the full extent of her necromantic powers in defense of the Black Mage's dominion.

name: Pink Bean
mechanics: Multiple statue phases before main fight; statues apply unique debuffs, final form uses time-based attacks.
rewards: Pink Bean equipment, totems, power crystals.
story_significance: The Transcendent of Time's reverse form, born from a paradox in the Temple of Time.

name: Pink Bean
mechanics: Statues have massively boosted HP and debuffs, Pink Bean's final form has DR phases and time stop.
rewards: Chaos Pink Bean gear, golden totems, superior crystals.
story_significance: Pink Bean at full temporal power, warping time itself as a fully unleashed reverse Transcendent.

name: Von Leon
mechanics: Elemental phase switches (fire/ice), lion summons, requires potions or elemental resistance.
rewards: Von Leon Royal equipment set, power crystals.
story_significance: The Lion King who was driven mad by the Black Mage's murder of his beloved queen, now ruling his frozen castle in eternal grief.

name: Arkarium
mechanics: Serpent summons, instant-kill snake attacks, time-based debuffs, requires precise movement.
rewards: Dominator Pendant, Mechanator Pendant, power crystals.
story_significance: A commander of the Black Mage and the manipulative serpent priest who orchestrated the fall of Empress Aria.

name: Magnus
mechanics: Meteor zone hazards, blue zones deal percent HP damage, requires constant repositioning.
rewards: Nova equipment, Magnus accessories, power crystals.
story_significance: A tyrant commander of the Black Mage who conquered the Nova homeworld of Grandis and enslaved its people.

name: Magnus
mechanics: Enhanced meteors covering most of the map, lethal blue zones, 15-minute time limit, extreme damage output.
rewards: Tyrant equipment (cape, belt, boots, gloves), superior crystals.
story_significance: Magnus at full power within his own fortress, the ultimate test of survival against the tyrant of Grandis.

name: Cygnus
mechanics: Summons Cygnus Knight shadows, elemental phase attacks matching each knight class, soul split mechanic.
rewards: Empress equipment set, Cygnus accessories, power crystals.
story_significance: A vision of Empress Cygnus corrupted by the Black Mage, testing whether heroes can face even their allies turned against them.

name: Lotus
mechanics: Three phases: robot summons, platforming with lasers, core destruction with electric hazards.
rewards: Absolab equipment coins, power crystals, Lotusroid Android.
story_significance: A commander of the Black Mage and twin brother of Orchid, whose body was hijacked while his spirit was imprisoned for centuries.

name: Lotus
mechanics: All phases have greatly enhanced damage, tighter laser patterns, harder platforming, electric field instakills.
rewards: Absolab equipment coins (more), superior crystals, guaranteed accessories.
story_significance: Lotus at maximum combat capability, the full power of the Black Mage's technological commander unleashed.

name: Damien
mechanics: Two phases: sword combat with altar mechanic, then demon form with brand debuff and flying attacks.
rewards: Absolab equipment coins, power crystals, Damienroid Android.
story_significance: The half-demon son of the Demon Slayer's family, corrupted by the Black Mage's influence and seeking to destroy the World Tree.

name: Damien
mechanics: Enhanced brand mechanic spreads to party, flying phase is longer, sword beams cover more area.
rewards: Absolab equipment coins (more), superior crystals, guaranteed drops.
story_significance: Damien fully consumed by demonic power, the tragic culmination of a boy twisted by vengeance and manipulation.

name: Lucid
mechanics: Two phases: dream world with butterfly/golem mechanics, then nightmare with dragon summons and platform breaking.
rewards: Arcane Umbra equipment materials, Dreamy Belt, power crystals.
story_significance: A commander of the Black Mage who controls the dream world, once an elf who admired the heroes but was twisted by darkness.

name: Lucid
mechanics: Golems require more hits, dragon phase has tighter timing, butterflies deal lethal damage, all patterns faster.
rewards: Arcane Umbra materials (more), superior accessories, guaranteed crystals.
story_significance: Lucid unleashing the full nightmare, warping reality and dreams into an inescapable labyrinth of terror.

name: Will
mechanics: Three phases: spider web mechanics, mirror world split, and final form with test tubes and acid pools.
rewards: Arcane Umbra materials, Twilight Mark accessories.
story_significance: A commander of the Black Mage who guards the dimensional gate, obsessed with spiders and weaving fate itself.

name: Will
mechanics: Web patterns are denser, mirror world phase has tighter split timing, acid pool coverage is larger.
rewards: Arcane Umbra materials (more), superior accessories, high-value crystals.
story_significance: Will's full power realized as he desperately guards the final gate before the Black Mage's sanctum.

name: Gloom
mechanics: Darkness gauge mechanic, shadow clone attacks, area denial through spreading dark zones.
rewards: Arcane Umbra materials, Gloom accessories, power crystals.
story_significance: A commander who feeds on despair and darkness, stationed at the border of the Moonbridge.

name: Gloom
mechanics: Darkness gauge fills faster, shadow clones are more aggressive, dark zones expand rapidly.
rewards: Arcane Umbra materials (more), superior crystals, enhanced accessories.
story_significance: Gloom at full power, plunging the battlefield into absolute darkness where hope cannot survive.

name: Verus Hilla
mechanics: Three phases with death counter mechanic, soul shackle binds, massive screen-wide attacks, resurrection mechanic.
rewards: Genesis equipment materials, Commanding Force Ring, Pitched Boss accessories.
story_significance: The true form of Hilla after receiving the Black Mage's ultimate blessing, commanding death itself at the threshold of Tenebris.

name: Darknell
mechanics: Sword and shield phases, charging attacks, lightning pillars, reflect mechanic, requires precise timing.
rewards: Genesis equipment materials, Pitched Boss accessories, Darknell gear.
story_significance: The Black Mage's loyal dark knight who guards the path through Labyrinth of Suffering, an embodiment of absolute martial loyalty.
location: Labyrinth of Suffering - Gate of Darkness

name: Black Mage
mechanics: Four phases with escalating mechanics; creation/destruction cycle, world-altering attacks, requires full 6-person coordination and multiple lives.
rewards: Genesis equipment materials, Black Mage exclusive drops, Pitched Boss accessories.
story_significance: The Transcendent of Light who became the ultimate evil, seeking to destroy and remake all of Maple World. The final boss of the entire Arcane River saga.

name: Seren
mechanics: Multi-phase sun/moon mechanic, light/dark gauge balancing, devastating wide-area attacks, requires split-party coordination.
rewards: Eternal equipment materials, Mitral accessories, Pitched Boss drops.
story_significance: The Transcendent of Light from Grandis and first major boss of the Grandis saga, wielding terrifying solar and lunar powers.

name: Kalos
mechanics: Shape-shifting boss with multiple forms, environment transformation attacks, party-splitting mechanics.
rewards: Eternal equipment materials, Kalos accessories, Pitched Boss drops.
story_significance: An ancient entity of chaos that emerged after the Grandis dimensional instability, threatening to consume Odium.

name: Kaling
mechanics: Illusion-based mechanics with true/false body detection, massive AoE attacks, debuff management, requires high coordination.
rewards: Eternal equipment materials, Kaling accessories, Pitched Boss drops.
story_significance: A powerful figure from the East who commands a vast criminal network in Grandis and manipulates events from the shadows with her fox magic.
